statusStatement: Every entry is research only. No catalog entry has been downloaded, incorporated, redistributed, or loaded by the application.

sources.name: Universal Base Characters
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official pack page labels the pack CC0. Reconfirm the included license file after acquisition.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 122 MB for the free Standard archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Canonical selected/near humanoid base, hair variants, and source for derived age and LOD variants.
sources.compatibilityNotes: Six bases, twenty hairstyles, a shared humanoid rig, and approximately 13k triangles per base are advertised; the pack is designed for the Universal Animation Library.
constraints: No purpose-built child or elder base
Occupation clothing needs project-authored additions
Benchmark skinning and texture budget before incorporation

sources.name: Universal Animation Library
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official pack page labels the animations CC0. Reconfirm the archive license after acquisition.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 15 MB for the free Standard archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Curated in-place locomotion, social, carry, sit, injury, and death clips on the canonical humanoid rig.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page advertises 120+ clips with root-motion and no-root-motion variants; version 3 and a July 2026 patch were visible when reviewed.
constraints: Do not ship the complete library by default
Simulation movement must not be driven by root motion
Validate bone names and clip bounds

sources.name: Universal Animation Library 2
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official pack page labels the animations CC0. Reconfirm the archive license after acquisition.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 17 MB for the free Standard archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: A small selection of farming, fishing, work, and other occupation clips missing from the first library.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page advertises 130+ additional clips and root-motion/no-root-motion variants on the same universal rig.
constraints: Curate only clips with visible simulation counterparts
Retest contact points against project tools
Validate July 2026 pack revision before pinning

sources.name: Downtown City MegaKit
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official pack page labels the pack CC0. Reconfirm included notices after acquisition.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 223 MB for the free Standard archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Curated facade, roof, trim, and street-detail modules assembled by project-authored building logic.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page advertises 300+ modular pieces, seven example buildings, and shared texture sets.
constraints: Fake-window interiors are not functional interiors
Project must generate collision and accessible doors
Do not ship example cities or the whole archive

sources.name: Stylized Nature MegaKit
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official creator download page labels the pack CC0. Reconfirm included notices after acquisition.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 99 MB for the free Standard archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: A coherent stylized nature family for instanced trees, plants, and rocks.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The creator page advertises 116 models, including forty trees, thirty-five plants or flowers, and twenty-seven rocks.
constraints: Benchmark alpha overdraw and instance count
Create close, medium, far, and orbital variants
Choose this or KayKit Forest as the primary nature language rather than mixing indiscriminately

sources.name: Ultimate Crops Pack
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official pack page labels the pack CC0.

sources.proposedUse: Visible crop growth stages tied directly to farm simulation state.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page advertises 102 models and multiple crops in five growth stages; Blender conversion to GLB is required.
constraints: No listed glTF download
Atlas and LOD generation required
Growth-stage timing remains simulation-owned

sources.name: Ultimate Home Interior Pack
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official pack page labels the pack CC0.

sources.proposedUse: Curated functional doors, windows, kitchen, bath, and furniture modules for accessible interiors.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page advertises 123 interior assets; Blender conversion to GLB is required.
constraints: Door clearance and pivots require validation
Furniture placement must follow navigation clearance
Do not populate inaccessible decorative rooms

sources.name: Public Transport Pack
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official pack page labels the pack CC0.

sources.proposedUse: Selected buses, rail, emergency, or service vehicles after project-specific wheel and collision setup.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page advertises twelve public-transport and service vehicles.
constraints: Downloaded shells are not assumed drivable
Wheel pivots, doors, collision, and LODs require authoring
Blender conversion to GLB required

sources.name: Cars Pack
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official pack page labels the pack CC0.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 2.6 MB was shown for an itch archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: A compact vehicle family for visible household and goods transportation.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page advertises eight cars; Blender conversion to GLB is required.
constraints: Normalize physical scale
Author wheel pivots and collision
Generate medium and far LODs

sources.name: Ultimate Animated Animals Pack
sources.creator: Quaternius

license.scopeNotes: The official pack page labels the pack CC0.

sources.proposedUse: Selected livestock or wildlife whose presence corresponds to food and ecology state.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page advertises twelve animals with at least twelve animations each.
constraints: Animals require independent simulation scope before incorporation
Do not add decorative wildlife disconnected from ecology
Curate clips and LODs

sources.name: KayKit Character Animations
sources.creator: Kay Lousberg

license.scopeNotes: The official creator page labels the pack CC0; the creator also asks users not to resell unmodified packs or claim authorship.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 14 MB for the free archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Fill specific work-animation gaps only after retargeting to the canonical Quaternius skeleton.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The July 2026 creator page advertises 161 animations, including twenty-eight tool actions, designed for KayKit medium and large rigs.
constraints: Non-KayKit retargeting can distort contact points
Bake only accepted clips to the canonical rig
Honor the creator's courtesy request not to mirror unmodified packs

sources.name: KayKit RPG Tools
sources.creator: Kay Lousberg

license.scopeNotes: The official creator page labels the pack CC0; honor the creator's no-unmodified-resale courtesy request.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 3.7 MB for the free archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Visible equipped tools that correspond to farming, building, repair, and resource tasks.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The creator page advertises forty-five or more tools on a shared atlas and pairs them with KayKit tool animations.
constraints: Validate grip orientation against canonical hand bones
Recolor into the project palette
Only render tools represented in inventory or work state

sources.name: KayKit Resource Bits
sources.creator: Kay Lousberg

license.scopeNotes: The official creator download page labels the pack CC0; honor the creator's no-unmodified-resale courtesy request.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 8.1 MB for the free archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Visible wood, stone, metals, textiles, fuel, stockpiles, cargo, and carried goods.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The creator page advertises seventy-five or more resource models using a shared 1024 atlas.
constraints: Asset counts must be projected from authoritative inventory
Use instancing for piles and cargo
Recolor into the project palette

sources.name: KayKit Furniture Bits
sources.creator: Kay Lousberg

license.scopeNotes: The official creator page labels the pack CC0; honor the creator's no-unmodified-resale courtesy request.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 3.6 MB for the free archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Compact shared-atlas furniture for accessible homes, businesses, institutions, and gathering spaces.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The creator page advertises fifty or more low-poly models using one atlas.
constraints: Validate seated pose height and nav clearance
Only furnish reachable spaces
Recolor into the project palette

sources.name: KayKit Forest Nature
sources.creator: Kay Lousberg

license.scopeNotes: The official creator page labels the pack CC0; honor the creator's no-unmodified-resale courtesy request.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 6.1 MB for the free archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Mobile-oriented alternative to the Quaternius nature family.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The July 2026 creator page advertises 100+ free models using a single 1024 gradient atlas.
constraints: Choose one primary nature language after a visual benchmark
Do not mix with Quaternius by default
Generate orbital representation

sources.name: KayKit City Builder Bits
sources.creator: Kay Lousberg

license.scopeNotes: The official creator page labels the pack CC0; honor the creator's no-unmodified-resale courtesy request.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 4.6 MB for the free archive when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Selected street furniture, vehicles, and distant settlement details rather than authoritative roads or buildings.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The creator page advertises thirty-two or more city models using one atlas.
constraints: Road geometry remains project-authored
Building shells require real door and interior validation
Avoid chibi-scale mismatch

sources.name: City Kit (Roads)
sources.creator: Kenney

license.scopeNotes: Kenney's official support page states that game assets on asset pages are CC0; optional attribution is not required.

sources.proposedUse: Roadside props, curbs, markings, and visual reference; not the authoritative road surface.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page lists seventy files; Kenney recommends its GLB distribution for smaller files.
constraints: Road centerlines and surfaces must be extruded from the simulation graph
Do not assemble a brittle tiled road topology
Pin archive bytes after download

sources.name: City Kit Suburban, Commercial, and Industrial
sources.creator: Kenney

license.scopeNotes: The catalog record groups three official CC0 packs for evaluation; each archive must become a separate manifest entry if acquired. Commercial: https://kenney.nl/assets/city-kit-commercial ; industrial: https://kenney.nl/assets/city-kit-industrial .

sources.proposedUse: Selected small structures and street details after scale and accessibility review.
sources.compatibilityNotes: Official pages list forty suburban, fifty commercial, and twenty-five industrial files.
constraints: Split provenance by archive on acquisition
Building shells do not prove accessible interiors
Project construction stages remain authoritative

sources.name: Nature Kit
sources.creator: Kenney

license.scopeNotes: Kenney's official support page states that game assets on asset pages are CC0.

sources.proposedUse: Fallback nature source if the primary Quaternius or KayKit family fails visual or performance targets.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page lists 330 files and GLB is a native distribution format.
constraints: Do not create a third conflicting nature language
Benchmark instances and atlas count
Select only if it materially improves a measured gap

sources.name: Furniture Kit
sources.creator: Kenney

license.scopeNotes: Kenney's official support page states that game assets on asset pages are CC0.

sources.proposedUse: Fill functional interior gaps left by the selected primary furniture family.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page lists 140 files and GLB is a native distribution format.
constraints: Validate scale and seated contact
Consolidate materials
Only place in accessible simulation-owned interiors

sources.name: Car Kit
sources.creator: Kenney

license.scopeNotes: Kenney's official support page states that game assets on asset pages are CC0.

sources.proposedUse: Alternative compact car family after a style benchmark against Quaternius vehicles.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page lists forty-five files and GLB is a native distribution format.
constraints: Author wheel pivots, collision, and LODs
Normalize physical scale
Choose one primary vehicle language

sources.name: Train Kit
sources.creator: Kenney

license.scopeNotes: Kenney's official support page states that game assets on asset pages are CC0.

sources.proposedUse: Future visible rail transport after the economy supports routes, schedules, and cargo movement.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official page lists one hundred files including track components.
constraints: Do not incorporate before rail simulation exists
Rail path is project-authored
Author wheel and collision behavior

sources.name: ambientCG
sources.creator: ambientCG

license.scopeNotes: Official documentation states downloadable asset files and preview renders are CC0. Each selected asset must receive its own manifest entry and hash.

sources.proposedUse: Build-time source for selected soil, terrain, road, roof, and wall materials.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The official API can help locate assets, but the application must never depend on it at runtime.
constraints: Pin each selected asset URL and archive hash
Downsample, color-grade, pack channels, and compress
Do not ship unneeded high-resolution sources

sources.name: Poly Haven
sources.creator: Poly Haven contributors

license.scopeNotes: Official licensing covers downloadable HDRIs, textures, and 3D models as CC0; site text, thumbnails, and metadata are outside that grant.

sources.proposedUse: One optimized lighting environment plus occasional hero nature or material assets.
sources.compatibilityNotes: Official technical standards describe functional glTF exports, but source texture resolutions are commonly unsuitable for direct web shipping.
constraints: Use manual or otherwise license-compliant acquisition
Commercial API automation requires a separate arrangement
Commit only resized and compressed derivatives

sources.name: The Base Mesh
sources.creator: The Base Mesh contributors

license.scopeNotes: The official FAQ states that the library is CC0, including commercial use without attribution. Verify the individual item page and downloaded notice.

sources.proposedUse: Fill specific industrial, medical, office, retail, food, and technology prop gaps.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The site advertises clean topology, UVs, real-world scale, and more than 1,250 base meshes; many need project materials.
constraints: Create one manifest record per selected item or provenance-compatible bundle
Apply shared project materials and LODs
Do not bulk-download without a measured need

sources.name: MakeHuman and MPFB output pipeline
sources.creator: MakeHuman Community

license.scopeNotes: Exported models are documented as CC0. MakeHuman code is AGPL and MPFB code is GPL; community clothing and hair packs can use different licenses and require item-level review.

sources.listedArchiveSize: 267 MB for the optional MakeHuman system asset pack when reviewed
sources.proposedUse: Future offline experiment for higher-detail body, face, age, and facial-morph variation.
sources.compatibilityNotes: MPFB's GameEngine material and rig/export-copy workflows can prepare a Blender GLB, but the result is heavier and stylistically different from the proposed Quaternius baseline.
constraints: Not an initial runtime dependency
Verify every community asset license separately
Benchmark retopology, atlas, rig, style, and close-camera cost before use

sources.name: Smithsonian Open Access 3D
sources.creator: Smithsonian Institution and identified collection contributors

license.scopeNotes: Only items individually marked CC0 are candidates. Record the item page, creator/collection, and item-specific license evidence.

sources.proposedUse: Rare discoveries, artifacts, monuments, or space/history content with item-level provenance.
sources.compatibilityNotes: Open Access highlights can supply culturally and historically meaningful hero objects, not core population or settlement assets.
constraints: Select only explicitly CC0-marked items
Optimize high-resolution museum scans aggressively
Do not strip collection context from provenance records

sources.name: @pmndrs/assets
sources.creator: pmndrs contributors

license.scopeNotes: The repository labels its content CC0. Record the pinned commit and upstream provenance for any selected file.

sources.proposedUse: Possible tiny bootstrap HDRI or texture while the project-specific environment pipeline is being established.
sources.compatibilityNotes: The repository contains web-sized derivatives and works with vanilla Three.js as well as React Three Fiber.
constraints: Pin a commit
Prefer first-party Poly Haven derivatives long term
Do not add the package merely for one static file
